title: Xtra Crispy Spanish Octopus Pulpo A La Gallega
description: A mustardy, pillowy, solo-dinner Spanish dish featuring clear honey, this recipe is a low-calorie-friendly version of the traditional pulpo a la gallega. It is a brine-dry, flavorful meal that is perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: octopus
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into small pieces

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, clear honey, dijon mustard, paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the octopus pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Let the octopus marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove the octopus from the marinade and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the lemon juice over the octopus and pour the water into the baking sheet.
Bake the octopus for 20 minutes or until it is cooked through and crispy on the outside.
Remove the octopus from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the octopus hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
